message: Node started: Analyze the prime factorization of 2023 and determine if it shares any common factors with 2. Specifically, check if 2023 is coprime to 2. Use this to determine if there exists an n such that 2023*n is a power of 2 (which would result in k(n)=1), or if the structure of 2023 forces a higher minimum Hamming weight.
